# R.A.H. Solutions, LLC

Landscaping company in Edgerton, WI specializing in landscape design, lawn care, hardscaping, concrete services, and year-round property maintenance.

## Business Information
- Owner: Robert Harried
- Phone: (608) 501-5123
- Email: rahsolutionsllc2@gmail.com
- Address: 262 County Road W, Edgerton, WI 53534
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00am–5:00pm, Saturday 7:00am–12:00pm, Sunday Closed
- Service Area: Edgerton, Stoughton, Janesville, Madison, WI — Rock and Dane counties, 50-mile radius
- Licensed: Yes
- Insured: Yes
- Founded: 2023
- Business Type: Family-owned and operated

## Services
- Lawn Maintenance
- Landscape Design
- Landscape Installation
- Hardscaping Services (patios, retaining walls, walkways)
- Concrete Services (driveways, patios, walkways)
- Tree Pruning
- Shrub Trimming
- Garden Maintenance
- Mulching Services
- Sod Installation
- Lawn Restoration
- Spring Yard Cleanup
- Fall Yard Cleanup
- Snow Removal (residential & commercial)
- Excavating Services
- Residential Lawn Care
- Commercial Lawn Care

## About
R.A.H. Solutions, LLC is a family-owned landscaping company founded in 2023 by Robert Harried in Edgerton, Wisconsin. The company serves homeowners and small businesses throughout Edgerton, Stoughton, Janesville, and Madison, delivering professional landscape design, installation, maintenance, hardscaping, concrete work, and year-round services including snow removal. R.A.H. Solutions is fully licensed and insured and takes a personalized approach — understanding each client's property, budget, and local Wisconsin climate conditions before recommending a plan.
